overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a truck simulator showing a Mercedes Actros driving through a heavy snowstorm at night on a multi-lane highway. The truck navigates curved road sections with active windshield wipers before approaching and entering a toll booth plaza with concrete barriers and overhead gantries.

events.description: truck navigates a right curve then transitions into a left curve on the snowy highway

agents.ego_description: steering the truck through winding highway curves while maintaining traction on snow-covered asphalt

entered.detail: metal highway guardrail running parallel to the left side of the road
metal highway guardrail running parallel to the right side of the road
snow-covered fields and terrain visible beyond the guardrails
Mercedes truck dashboard with illuminated gauges and GPS navigation screen
windshield wipers actively clearing heavy snow from the front glass

segments.scene_description: The segment shows first-person truck driving through a heavy snowstorm at night on a curved highway section. Metal guardrails line both sides of the road while snow-covered fields extend into the darkness. The windshield wipers move continuously to clear the accumulating snow, and the dashboard instruments are illuminated.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight highway section with overhead signage

events.description: passing under overhead highway directional signs
an oncoming truck passes in the opposite lane

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed on straight highway sections while monitoring road conditions

notable_agents.action: oncoming truck traveling in the opposite direction with headlights visible through the snow

entered.detail: highway overhead gantry with directional signage visible above the road

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving on straighter highway sections with guardrails visible at mid-distance. An overhead sign gantry appears and passes overhead, and an oncoming truck is briefly visible through the heavy snowfall. The road remains covered in snow with active wipers maintaining visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll booth plaza with multiple lanes and concrete barriers

events.description: exiting open highway and entering toll plaza approach with concrete barriers
aligning with toll lane and approaching the toll booth structure

agents.ego_description: slowing down and steering into the designated toll lane while approaching the booth

entered.detail: large toll plaza infrastructure with multiple lanes and overhead canopy
tall concrete divider walls replacing metal guardrails at the toll approach
toll booth buildings with windows and payment equipment visible ahead
illuminated green traffic lights indicating open toll lanes
large overhead structure spanning across the toll plaza lanes

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches and enters a toll booth plaza, transitioning from open highway to a structured toll area with concrete barriers and overhead gantries. Green traffic lights indicate open lanes ahead as the truck slows down and aligns with a toll booth lane, leaving the snow-covered fields behind for the paved toll plaza surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective of a truck navigating a treacherous nighttime snowstorm that transitions from an open highway into a structured toll plaza. It begins on a curved section of road where windshield wipers fight accumulating snow and illuminated dashboard instruments glow against the darkness of snow-covered fields. As the road straightens, the camera passes under an overhead sign gantry and catches a glimpse of an oncoming truck through the heavy snowfall. The scene then shifts as the open highway gives way to a toll booth plaza, moving past concrete barriers and under overhead gantries. Finally, the truck slows down and aligns with a lane marked by green traffic lights, leaving the wild, snowy landscape behind for the paved surface of the toll area.
